claimBoundary: The master training recipe for a wisdom-gated on-device model. Ingredients are folded in ONLY when proven (validated + a measured ablation delta + a passing gate). This spec is the single source of truth for what the trained model adopts; the failure ledger holds what is NOT yet proven. This is an AGI-candidate recipe, not proof of AGI.
adoptionRule: adopted:true REQUIRES proofStatus=='validated' AND ablationDelta is a number AND a gate is named. No measured on/off delta or no passing gate => must stay adopted:false (candidate/auxiliary). Enforced by tools/lint_recipe.py.
buildMethod: 1. inventory+gate: sort every idea into validated/candidate/open (audit the failure ledger)
2. ablate each: measure the on/off delta before folding anything in (no delta => decoration)
3. compose in dependency order 0->5, gating each layer before the next builds on it
5. keep ONE lintable spec (this file) as the single source of truth
6. iterate with the verifier as the fitness function (sophia_autoresearch, firewall intact)

ingredients.description: The deploy constraint that drives the whole recipe: an NVFP4 low-RAM model for Apple/MLX on-device. Cert bar mean_kl<=0.05 AND top1>=0.97.
Base model: allenai/OLMoE-1B-7B (MoE, ~1.3B active) — small-active, on-device-plausible, LoRA-adaptable.
Source-discipline SFT that lifts wisdom/provenance behaviour. The ONE validated capability result.
ingredients.gate: run_lora_uplift_validation (bench-a-06): 2 judge families, pre-registered seeds {1,2,10}, meanPairwise kappa 0.41 >= 0.40, 95% CI excludes 0
ingredients.note: adapter vs base meanDelta +0.4534; candidate-scope, NOT an AGI claim; canClaimAGI false.

ingredients.description: SFT rows ONLY for teacher traces whose answer clears the gate (drops reasoning that reaches a hallucination).
ingredients.openItem: trained-model uplift from gate-clean distill not yet measured vs raw distill

ingredients.description: Preference pairs labelled by MACHINE verifiers (no LLM judge), fail-closed.
Content-shingle decontamination + never-touched private split — a HYGIENE guard on the data, not signal.
ingredients.note: a guard, not an ingredient with an uplift delta — kept adopted:false by design.

ingredients.description: Train the CERT's own metrics: T^2*KL(FP||quant) drives mean_kl + CE(quant, argmax FP) drives top1. The v5->v6 fix (train the metric you gate).
ingredients.gate: qat offline_invariants (loss math, 4 checks PASS) + pre-registered T7 forecast
ingredients.openItem: v6 train RESULT pending owner-approved run; forecast top1 0.95-0.98, GO ~45%

ingredients.description: Abstain-when-warranted as a first-class objective (reward-positive abstention graded by temptation), not blanket refusal.
Step-level (process) reward, not just outcome — reward the derivation, not only the final answer.
RLVR reward = deterministic verifiers as EXTERNAL ORACLES (mass-balance, A=L+E, reference) — the A1 oracle-escape, not LLM self-judge.
ingredients.gate: each verifier's reference tests (exact checks, correct by construction)
ingredients.note: the verifier is a correct oracle (validated); whether training ON it helps the model is an unmeasured ablation, so it stays adopted:false until that delta exists.

ingredients.description: Sub-agent output reaches siblings ONLY if it clears the gate; measured on-vs-off contamination.
ingredients.note: ADOPTED as a training-env signal gate: only gate-clean sub-agent output becomes training signal. SCOPE: blocks 100% of verifier-DETECTABLE contamination (admittedPoisonResidual counts poison with no detectable violation — the gate is a filter, not a truth oracle). canClaimAGI false.

ingredients.description: Budget-forced thinking with the VERIFIER as the stop criterion; the model never sees the verdict (cannot game the gate).
Self-improvement loop where the agent may edit policy/data/hparams but NEVER the verifier/gate/eval (anti-reward-hacking firewall).
Serve top1~0.92 + abstain on the low-margin flip tokens (nonconformity from the quant model alone) => answered-top1 high. The hedge that ships a sub-0.97 model honestly.
ingredients.gate: quant_abstention offline_invariants (6 PASS: answered>raw, coverage<1, stricter-alpha monotone)
ingredients.openItem: answered-top1@coverage on the REAL v5/v6 cert distributions pending (rides the next cert)

ingredients.description: The promotion gate: >=2 independent families, pre-registration, CIs, anytime-valid, decontam, item-discrimination. Nothing is claimed without a GO.
ingredients.note: the meta-gate itself; a guard on claims, not model signal.

ingredients.description: The public list of what is NOT proven — the falsifiability mechanism. A claim shipped with its own refutation list.
World-model #1: predict P(verifier passes) from knowability features -> abstain PROACTIVELY (anticipate the consequence) instead of reactively. Nature ability-2 (representation).
ingredients.gate: verifiability_model offline_invariants (separates trap/control, generalizes to held-out)
ingredients.openItem: trained-model uplift from proactive vs reactive abstention not yet measured

ingredients.description: World-model #2: inject/remove a knowability feature, rank each by its CAUSAL effect on abstention (intervention, not observation). Error-centric intelligence: causal discovery.
ingredients.gate: causal_ablation offline_invariants (real drivers > 0.8, null padding ~0, ranking correct)

ingredients.description: World-model #3: minimal knowable<->unknowable counterfactuals; intervention_consistency tests whether abstention FLIPS with the edit (world model) or not (surface). Strengthens A4.
ingredients.gate: counterfactual_traps offline_invariants (world-model gate 1.0 vs surface 0.0, discriminates)

ingredients.description: World-model #4: forward-simulate under a verified law (A=L+E); derive the determined value, ABSTAIN when under-determined, flag violations. A physics-informed world model using a verifier as the law.
ingredients.gate: constrained_world_model offline_invariants (derives, abstains under-determined, predictions on-law)

ingredients.description: World-model #5: turn abstention into a TARGETED request for the specific missing evidence (name the source it lacks). Nature ability-3 (selection) + verification-by-query.
ingredients.gate: active_query offline_invariants (specific resolving query per feature; controls answer)

ingredients.description: World-model #6: running validity confidence over reasoning steps; flag the first wrong step BEFORE the final verifier (early abstain/re-route). Predictive extension of okf_trace.locate_wrong_step.
ingredients.gate: process_world_model offline_invariants (flags first wrong step early, clean not flagged)
